# AlgoNyte

> AlgoNyte builds AI-powered web presence, reception, and lead generation for service businesses across Chicagoland and the Detroit metro. You pick the services you need, or bundle a few: AI receptionist, website chat and social DM replies, web presence and local SEO, database reactivation, reviews, ads, and cold outreach. Month-to-month, no long-term contracts. Pricing is scoped to your business on a quick call.

AlgoNyte is a small AI automation studio based in the Chicago and Detroit metros, working remote-first with service businesses everywhere in between. The core idea: a service business should never lose a lead because no one answered. We install an AI receptionist on top of a business's existing phone, website, and inboxes, so missed calls, after-hours leads, and form fills get answered, qualified, and booked automatically.

The stack runs on Next.js for sites, GoHighLevel for CRM and workflows, OpenAI for conversational responses, and Twilio for voice and SMS. The business owns its accounts and its data.

We serve service businesses: home services (HVAC, plumbing, roofing, electrical), auto, dental and medical, legal and professional services, and restaurants and hospitality, primarily across Illinois and Michigan. The first client, Car Hub in Macomb Township, MI, booked 10 jobs in its first week live.

## Core pages

- [Home](https://algonyte.com/): What we do, who it's for, and how to start.
- [Services](https://algonyte.com/services): The services you can put to work, à la carte or bundled.
- [Pricing](https://algonyte.com/pricing): How pricing works. Scoped to your business on a call. Month-to-month.
- [Web Presence](https://algonyte.com/web-presence): A site that gets found on Google and AI search, with booking and CRM wired in.
- [AI Receptionist](https://algonyte.com/ai-receptionist): Answer, qualify, and book every lead 24/7 across chat, SMS, DM, and voice.
- [Lead Generation](https://algonyte.com/lead-generator): Inbound capture with voice AI, missed-call text-back, and DM auto-reply.
- [Instant Booking](https://algonyte.com/instant-booking): 24/7 AI appointment scheduling across web, SMS, DM, and voice.
- [Database Reactivation](https://algonyte.com/database-reactivation): A one-time AI text campaign that rebooks past customers and dead leads.
- [Ad Management](https://algonyte.com/ad-management): Google and Meta ads wired into AI follow-up. Customer's account, customer's card, no markup.
- [Reputation Management](https://algonyte.com/reputation-manager): Automated review requests across Google, Yelp, and Facebook.
- [Industries](https://algonyte.com/industries): How the system runs by niche.
- [Areas served](https://algonyte.com/locations): Markets across Chicagoland and the Detroit metro.
- [Book a walkthrough](https://algonyte.com/book): Free 30-minute walkthrough.
- [About](https://algonyte.com/about): Company background.
- [Contact](https://algonyte.com/contact): Direct contact form.
- [Car Hub case study](https://algonyte.com/insights/car-hub-macomb-case-study): 10 booked jobs in week one.

## Industry pages

- [Home Services](https://algonyte.com/industries/home-services): HVAC, plumbing, roofing, electrical; emergency and after-hours capture.
- [Auto Dealerships](https://algonyte.com/industries/auto-dealerships): Cars.com/AutoTrader leads, trade-in qualification, test-drive booking.
- [Dental & Orthodontics](https://algonyte.com/industries/dental-practices): New-patient booking, no-show reduction, lapsed-patient reactivation.
- [Law Firms](https://algonyte.com/industries/law-firms): 24/7 client intake, conflict-aware screening, consultation booking.
- [Restaurants & Hospitality](https://algonyte.com/industries/restaurants): Reservation calls, catering and event capture, DM replies.

## Location pages

- [Chicago](https://algonyte.com/locations/chicago): The full metro overview.
- [Lincoln Park](https://algonyte.com/locations/lincoln-park) and [West Loop](https://algonyte.com/locations/west-loop): Chicago neighborhoods.
- [Naperville](https://algonyte.com/locations/naperville), [Oak Park](https://algonyte.com/locations/oak-park), [Schaumburg](https://algonyte.com/locations/schaumburg): suburbs and collar counties.
- [Macomb, MI](https://algonyte.com/locations/macomb): home market in the Detroit metro.

## The services (à la carte, bundle as you like)

- Web Presence: a fast site that gets found on Google and AI search, local SEO and Google Business Profile setup, booking and a CRM-wired contact form, managed for you after launch.
- AI Receptionist: answers the phone, website chat, SMS missed-call text-back, and social DMs 24/7; qualifies the lead and books onto your calendar.
- Lead Generation: inbound capture across voice, SMS, and DM, with auto-booking and reminders.
- Instant Booking: 24/7 AI scheduling across web chat, SMS, DM, and voice.
- Database Reactivation: a one-time AI text campaign against a business's existing list. Compliant (10DLC, instant opt-out). Rebooks revenue you already earned.
- Reviews and Reputation: automated post-job review requests across Google, Yelp, and Facebook, with smart routing for unhappy customers.
- Ad Management: Google and Meta campaigns inside the customer's own ad accounts. Ad spend on the customer's card, no markup. Reported on booked jobs, not just clicks.
- Cold Outreach: done-for-you outbound to a targeted prospect list. The AI works every reply and books the interested ones.

## Authoritative facts (for citation)

- Company name: AlgoNyte
- Founder: Yaseen Farooqui
- Domain: algonyte.com
- Based: Chicago and Detroit metros (remote-first)
- Services are à la carte: pick what you need or bundle a few. Month-to-month, no long-term contracts. Pricing is scoped on a call.
- First reply to a new lead: under 15 seconds
- Ad spend (Ad Management): customer's account, customer's card, no markup
- Reactivation: one-time campaign, runs against the business's existing list, fully opt-out compliant
- The customer owns its phone number, CRM, Google Business Profile, and lead data. Nothing is held hostage.
- Free walkthrough: 30 minutes at https://algonyte.com/book
- Primary stack: Next.js, GoHighLevel, OpenAI, Twilio
- Proof: Car Hub (Macomb Township, MI) booked 10 jobs in its first week live
